message:
🐛 Use native browser paste instead of clipboard API (#133)

Removed navigator.clipboard.readText() for paste (Cmd/Ctrl+V) and
instead rely on the browser's native paste event flowing through to
xterm.js. When attachCustomKeyEventHandler returns false, xterm skips
processing but does NOT preventDefault, so the browser fires a paste
event which xterm handles natively via its textarea.

This is more reliable (no clipboard API permission needed), avoids
potential double-paste, and works consistently in both single and
tile terminal modes.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
